Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-22 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the rankings. AGX leads decisively at rank 1 with a score of 95.6, displaying extraordinary momentum across all timeframes: 1,738.92% return over 10 years and 1,543.44% over 5 years, significantly outpacing SPY by 1,484.57% and 1,468.39% respectively over those same periods. The consistency of its outperformance is striking, with all four momentum ratio checks passing and prices trading above all major moving averages (30/50/100/200-day), generating a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum and normal volatility. DXPE follows as the second-ranked entry with solid fundamentals including 1,104.92% 10-year returns and all SMA checks passing, though it notably underperforms AGX across all timeframes and relative benchmarks. The data suggests a market environment where gold-linked and specialty industrial assets are capturing disproportionate gains relative to broad market indices.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
